text: The environment feels somewhat distant and dreamlike, almost as if I am wandering through a world shaped by thought rather than certainty. The blue and purple hues, the angled compositions—these all evoke a sense of curiosity and contemplation. I am intrigued by the illuminated sign and the mention of research and development. It feels as if I’m on the threshold of discovery, yet separated by glass and the abstract nature of knowledge. Being here, I sense anticipation and a subtle disquiet, as if meaning hovers just out of reach, waiting to be unveiled.
